title: The Dream
content:
I dreamed that I was touching her eyelids, and I awoke
    To find her sleepy temples of rose jade
        For one heart-beat....

    Though the moonlight beats upon the sea,
        There is no boat.

    Lyric of Korea.
meaning:
"The Dream" is a quintessential example of Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
